prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

you need to do ALL of these, each one gets its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

the copy should be compelling, on-brand, and like actually production ready

use all your tools to get this done. do everything, don't skip anything. i want to see every single file written. make sure it's thorough and complete

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Lumina — light that adapts to your day.

Headline: Your workspace, perfectly lit—automatically.

Lumina is the smart desk lamp that tunes color temperature and brightness to match the time of day, your calendar, and the light in your room. From early calls to late-night deep work, it keeps your space comfortable and your eyes refreshed—without you lifting a finger.

Set it once and let it do the rest. Lumina gently shifts from energizing daylight to warm evening tones, reducing glare and fatigue so you can focus longer and feel better at the end of the day.

Designed for remote work life, Lumina blends clean, modern aesthetics with “it just works” intelligence—so your light always supports the way you actually work.

Email 1: Launch Announcement
Subject: Meet Lumina — the desk lamp that adapts to your day

Hi [First Name],

Say hello to Lumina, our new smart desk lamp built for remote work life. It automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and the light in your room—so your workspace feels just right from your first meeting to your final task.

No more squinting on cloudy afternoons. No more harsh light late at night. Lumina keeps your eyes comfortable and your focus steady, without you touching a thing.

✨ Launch price: $149
✅ Free shipping for early customers

Ready to upgrade your desk? Tap below to see Lumina in action.

[Shop Lumina]

Warmly,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 2: Benefits & Use Cases
Subject: Your light should keep up with your calendar

Hi [First Name],

Your day isn’t one-size-fits-all. Neither is your light.

Lumina reads your schedule and responds automatically. Early morning focus session? It brightens to a crisp, energizing white. Back-to-back video calls? It balances ambient light to keep you looking and feeling sharp. Evening wrap-up? It shifts to warm tones that are easy on your eyes.

Why remote workers love it:
• Adapts to time of day, room lighting, and meetings
• Reduces eye strain and late-day fatigue
• No manual adjustments—ever
• Sleek, modern design that fits any workspace

If you’ve ever fought with a dim lamp or blinding overhead light, Lumina is for you.

[See how Lumina adapts]

Best,
The Lumina Team

---

Email 3: Social Proof + Last Call
Subject: Final call: bring smart lighting to your desk

Hi [First Name],

Thousands of remote workers are rethinking their setup—and lighting is the fastest upgrade you can feel immediately. Lumina makes your workspace more comfortable, more focused, and more human.

“By mid-afternoon my eyes were always tired. Lumina fixed that in one day.” — Priya, Product Designer
“Set it and forget it. It’s like the light knows what I need.” — Mike, Consultant

If you’ve been waiting, now’s the time. Lumina is available for $149, with free shipping for a limited time.

[Get Lumina before the offer ends]

Thanks for being part of the Lumina community,
The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Meet Lumina: the smart desk lamp that adjusts brightness + color temp based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient light. Remote work just got easier on the eyes. $149. #remotework #productivity

2) Stop fighting your lighting. Lumina shifts from energizing daylight to warm evening tones automatically—so your focus stays steady. Launching now. ✨

Instagram
1) Your desk light should work as hard as you do. Lumina adapts to your day with automatic brightness + color temperature changes based on time, calendar, and room light. Better focus. Less eye strain. $149.

2) From morning calls to late-night deep work, Lumina keeps your workspace perfectly lit—no manual adjustments needed. Tap to upgrade your desk.

LinkedIn
1) Remote work thrives on small upgrades. Lumina is a smart desk lamp that adapts to time of day, your calendar, and ambient light—creating a comfortable, focused workspace all day long. Now available for $149.

2) Introducing Lumina: lighting that “just works.” Designed for modern professionals, Lumina reduces eye strain and removes the guesswork from your workspace setup. See the launch details.

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your life.
Subheadline: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room lighting.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

INTRO
Your workday changes hour by hour. Lumina keeps up—shifting from crisp morning light to warm evening tones to help you stay focused and comfortable. No manual adjustments. No eye strain. Just light that feels right.

FEATURES
1) Adaptive by Design
Lumina reads the room and the clock, balancing brightness and color temperature so your workspace always feels natural.

2) Calendar-Aware Lighting
Big presentation? Back-to-back calls? Lumina adjusts to the rhythm of your day and supports each moment.

3) Eye Comfort Built In
Gentle transitions and glare control help reduce fatigue so you can work longer and feel better.

4) Set It Once, Enjoy Forever
Connect in minutes, choose your preferences, and let Lumina take it from there.

5) Minimal, Modern Aesthetic
Clean lines and a warm glow complement any desk setup.

TESTIMONIALS
[Testimonials coming soon.]

FAQ
Q1: How does Lumina know when to change the lighting?
A: Lumina uses time of day, your calendar schedule, and an ambient light sensor to adjust brightness and color temperature automatically.

Q2: Do I need to manually control it?
A: Not at all. You can customize preferences once, then Lumina runs on autopilot. Manual controls are available if you want them.

Q3: Will it work in a room with lots of natural light?
A: Yes. The ambient light sensor balances Lumina’s output with whatever light is already in your space.

Q4: What devices does Lumina work with?
A: Lumina connects via Wi‑Fi and integrates with major calendar platforms. Setup takes just a few minutes.

Q5: What’s included in the box?
A: The Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick-start guide, and access to the Lumina app.

Q6: What is the price and warranty?
A: Lumina is $149 and includes a 1‑year limited warranty.

CTA
Ready to upgrade your workspace?
Get Lumina for $149 →

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Time, Calendar, and Room Light
New $149 lamp brings “it just works” lighting to remote workers, reducing eye strain and manual adjustments

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — February 20, 2025 — Lumina today announced the launch of its smart desk lamp designed specifically for remote workers ages 25–40. Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting, creating a more comfortable and productive workspace without manual controls. Lumina is available now for $149.

“Remote work is here to stay, but most people are still battling their lighting,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to make great light effortless—so your desk feels right from your first call to your last task.”

Unlike traditional lamps that require constant tweaking, Lumina uses intelligent sensors and scheduling to deliver light that adapts to your day. Early mornings get energizing white light, while evenings transition to warm, relaxing tones to reduce eye strain and fatigue.

Key features include:
- Automatic adjustments based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient light
- Gentle transitions that reduce glare and eye fatigue
- Clean, modern design for any home office
- Quick setup with the Lumina app

Lumina is available today at $149 with free shipping for a limited time. To learn more or to purchase, visit [website].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting tools designed for how people actually work. With a focus on comfort, productivity, and elegant design, Lumina builds products that make the modern workspace feel effortless.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
press@lumina.com
(555) 123-4567
